name: Berry Delite Fruit Dip
recipeIngredient: 1 package IMO Fat-Free Sour Cream (16 oz)
recipeInstructions:
1. In a medium bowl, combine the IMO Fat-Free Sour Cream, raspberry jam, honey, grated lime rind, and optional lime juice.
2. Mix well until all ingredients are thoroughly combined.
3. Cover the bowl and refrigerate for several hours to allow the flavors to blend together.
